allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: if item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = item[''text''] # Print first 500 chars of each text block print\(text[:500]\) print\(''---END BLOCK---''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: if item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = item[''text''] if ''function'' in text and ''className'' in text: # Find where the JSX/function starts idx = text.find\(''function ''\) if idx > 0: print\(text[idx:idx+5000]\) print\(''...\(truncated\)''\) break ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in data: if item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = item[''text''] if ''function'' in text and ''className'' in text: # Find all function names import re funcs = re.findall\(r''function\\s+\(\\w+\)'', text\) print\(''All component functions found:''\) for f in funcs: print\(f'' - {f}''\) break ")
